jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Droom
jsonLd.description:
Droom invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Droom:
Droom is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Droom!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
